description: Colombian drug cartel based in Cali, founded by the Rodríguez Orejuela brothers and José Santacruz Londoño after breaking from Pablo Escobar in 1988. At its peak (1993-1995), it controlled over 80% of the world's cocaine market and was considered the most powerful criminal organization globally. The cartel operated through a decentralized cell structure and was dismantled by the mid-1990s.
